name: CANTOS canakinumab atherosclerosis trial
summary: A large randomized placebo-controlled trial of IL-1beta inhibition with canakinumab in post-myocardial-infarction patients with residual inflammatory risk, with cardiovascular outcomes and later aging-relevant post hoc analyses.
population: Patients with previous myocardial infarction and hsCRP of at least 2 mg/L

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Cytokine and Inflammasome Modulation because they can show whether the intervention changes health or disease-risk outcomes, function, biomarkers, and safety in Patients with previous myocardial infarction and hsCRP of at least 2 mg/L. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
